$comment: Single source of truth for the 10 golden examples. Consumed by two seeders: scp-memory-core/seed/seed_golden_examples.py (engine, via HTTP API) and SCPMemoryEngine_AndroidReferenceApp/seed/seed_golden_device.py (Android, direct Room write with backdated ages). See documents/11-demo-and-examples-pack.md.

examples.demonstrates: Baseline high-provenance (user) preference; older than its contradiction

examples.content: User switched to light mode and no longer wants dark mode
examples.demonstrates: Contradiction vs mem_gold_darkmode; recent so freshness ranks it higher

examples.content: User wants to become a staff engineer within 2 years

examples.demonstrates: Inferred provenance (0.5) -> lower confidence floor than user-stated

examples.content: Summary: user is pursuing a staff-engineer role and prefers short, focused meetings
examples.demonstrates: Consolidation provenance (0.75) with derived_from (on-device); summary lifecycle

examples.content: Spent 2450 rupees on dinner at a Goa beach shack, paid by card
Netflix subscription renews on the 18th, 649 rupees per month
examples.demonstrates: Recurring fact; fact freshness decays slowly vs an event

examples.content: Goa beach trip — sunset photos with college friends
examples.demonstrates: Semantic gallery (query by event, not filename) + event decay at 35 days

examples.content: Flight ticket Delhi to Goa, seat 14A, 8200 rupees — biggest trip expense
examples.demonstrates: Hybrid retrieval by route/semantics; cross-use-case (gallery + finance)

examples.content: User's timezone is IST (Asia/Kolkata), set during onboarding
